content: Dashboard performance pitfalls in inventory MIS: N+1 query patterns (loading each product's stock separately instead of in bulk JOIN), computing aggregates on every page load instead of caching or pre-aggregating, missing indexes on frequently filtered columns (date ranges, product_id, status), loading full transaction history to show summary KPIs, and lack of pagination on large result sets. Prevention: use database-level aggregation queries with indexes, cache dashboard KPIs with short TTLs, add query explain-plan review before shipping reports.
